title: VeriDoc Phase 12 MVP representative evaluation dataset

expectations: numeric and date values preserve their intended types
merged-cell handling is surfaced for review

expected_warnings: DOCX table contains merged cells; xlsx artifact requires review
review_focus: confirm blank optional cells remain blank

expectations: all representative worksheets are emitted in source order
typed values are rendered without dropping leading zeros
worksheet names remain visible as headings

expected_warnings: source bounding boxes are unavailable and converted blocks require review
review_focus: confirm dates, decimals, booleans, and leading-zero identifiers

expectations: the ruled table is emitted as editable cells
source-page and bounding-box evidence remains attached

review_focus: confirm table boundaries and blank-cell preservation
confirm source evidence for the extracted table

expectations: the image-only source is recognized as requiring OCR
any OCR-derived content remains explicitly review-required

expected_warnings: image-only scanned PDF requires OCR and reviewer confirmation
review_focus: reject automatic confirmation without trusted OCR evidence
confirm orientation and completeness before accepting OCR-derived text

expectations: record fields remain linked to source evidence

expected_warnings: high-risk record fields require reviewer confirmation
review_focus: confirm high-risk field evidence against the source page
confirm no signature or approval value is auto-confirmed
